message:
chore(install): bump INSTALLER_VERSION from 1.0.8 to 1.0.10

Update the INSTALLER_VERSION constant in install.sh from "1.0.8" to
"1.0.10". This version string is defined at the top of the installer
script (line 39) inside the Configuration section and is used to
identify which revision of the curl|bash installer is running. The
bump skips 1.0.9, advancing directly to 1.0.10, aligning the
installer version with upstream release milestones.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -36,7 +36,7 @@ set -euo pipefail
 # Configuration
 # ============================================================================
 
-INSTALLER_VERSION="1.0.8"
+INSTALLER_VERSION="1.0.10"
 VERSION="${VERSION:-}"  # Set dynamically based on install mode
 REPO_URL="https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/remote_compilation_helper"
 GITHUB_REPO="Dicklesworthstone/remote_compilation_helper"
